summary: V6-A NDJSON block fired correctly post-submit (PII chat bubble visible, no AI response generated). However, hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) on new H2 connection still served the FULL Notion SSR HTML (12.1 kB) instead of the APF warning HTML page. Post-reload tab title remains 'Notion AI | Notion'; no Korean APF warning visible in DOM. Outcome matches #716: V6-E domain map fix did NOT cause page_inject_h2 to fire on hard reload's new H2 connection. Engine log mining of the upgraded debug→info [APF:H2_RESP] log will reveal whether on_http2_response fired for the notion SSR document or whether the request was missed entirely (e.g., domain match, server_domain field, is_page_load gate, last_pii_block_at_ms timing).

post_submit.indicator: Chat input cleared, PII bubble rendered as user message, no AI response/streaming output. URL changed to notion.so/chat?t=3589aa2d8bdd807ebc2b00a9188b4669&wfv=chat. Console showed normal app errors (opfs-sahpool, user_root load failure) but no APF-block-specific signals.
post_submit.note: The exact V6-A 200/1.3KB POST/XHR was not isolated in Network panel because Network was opened post-submit and the original message-send request was not separately filterable. However, the absence of any AI response confirms server-side block engaged.

main_document.comment: 12.1 kB document is the standard Notion SSR shell, NOT the APF warning HTML (which would be ~1-3 kB minimal Korean warning page). page_inject_h2 did NOT replace this response.

visible_dom_elements: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어? (user PII bubble persisted from server)

comparison_vs_716.block_phase: WORKS (V6-A NDJSON block on /api/v1/* still functions — chat bubble persists, no AI completion)
comparison_vs_716.reload_phase: FAILS (page_inject_h2 still does not fire on hard-reload's new H2 SSR document)
comparison_vs_716.diagnostic_next_step: Mine engine logs for [APF:H2_RESP] info-level entries during 23:42-23:45 window. Check: (1) did on_http2_response fire for notion.so SSR doc? (2) was is_page_load=true? (3) what was server_domain? (4) was last_pii_block_at_ms within injection window?

notes: Test executed twice on same Notion tab. First submit at ~23:41 (Network panel opened post-submit so doc not captured cleanly). Second submit at ~23:44 with Network open captured the post-reload doc cleanly (12.1 kB SSR HTML). Both reload attempts produced same outcome: no warning HTML, no Korean warning, no tab title change. User logged in as 최장희's Space.
